titleStmt.title: SII 26.718: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 718. (A.R. No. 667 of 1909.) TIRUNEḌUṄGAḶAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the same shrine.

p.hi: Tribhº Sundarapāṇḍyadēva I: Year 8, Makara (Tai) śu. 10, Wednesday, Rōhiṇī = 1258 A.D., January 16.

summary.p: This inscription contains at the beginning, a praśasti of the king in Sanskrit, engraved in Grantha characters. It gives the titles of the king as follows: Sōmakula-tilaka, Madhurāpuri-Mādhava, Kēraḷavaṁśa-nirmūlana, Laṅkābdhiluṁṭana, Dvitīya Rāma, Chōḻakulaśaila-kuliśa, Karṇāṭakarāja vidrāvaṇa, Kāñchīpuravarādhīśvara, Gaṇapatihariṇa-śārddūla, Nēllūrapura-virachita-vī[rā*] bhishēka, etc.

It records a sale of 8 vēli of land by a certain Tirukkāṭṭuppaḷḷiuḍaiyāṉ Śeḻiyakaṅgaṉ of Kiḷiyūr in Kiḷiyūr-nāḍu, in Pāṇḍikulapati-vaḷanāḍu to the temple of the god Tiruneḍuṅgaḷa-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār in Vaḍakavi-nāḍu in the same nāḍu. It is stated that the land belonged to the Periyamudali alias Kāṅgayar, the younger brother of the above-mentioned Śeḻiyakaṅgaṉ and that the former had left the place not being able to pay the dues. It is also stated that price for the land was 450 Āṉṟāḍu Naṟkāśu. This document was called Vilaipramāṇa-iśaivutīṭṭu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . svastisamasta jagadādhāra somakulatilaka madhurāpurimādhava ke
raḷavamśanirmmūlana laṅkādpiluṭhaṭana davitiyarāma coḷakulaśailakuliśa karṇāṭaka
rājavidrāvaṇa kāṭakkari kūṭaka pākalavividha ripudurggamarddana kavirakaṇṭakopāla vipinadāva
vina kāñcipuravarādhiśvara gaṇavatihariṇaśārddūla nellūrapuraviracitavirābhiṣeka pratinitarājapratiṭṭā
paka mahārājādhirāja parameśvara śrī koccaṭaipaṉmarāna tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī cuṉtarapāṇ
ṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu Ç makaranāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu daśamiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa ro
kaṇi nāḷ pāṇṭikulapativaḷanāṭṭu kiḷiyūr nāṭṭu kiḷiyūruṭaiyāṉ tirukkāṭṭupaḷḷi Uṭaiyāṉ
ṉāṉa ceḻiyakaṅkaṉeṉ nilavilai Icaivutiṭṭu [ ] ṉāṭṭu vaṭakavi nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruneṭu
ṅkaḷa Uṭaiya nāyaṉār tirukkoyil Ādicaṇḍeśvaratevar kaṉmikaḷukku yiṟṟai nāḷāl nāṉ viṟṟu kuṭu
tta nilamāvatu Eṉ tampi periya mutaliyāṉa kāṅkayar Ivvāṇṭu kāruṭaṉai Aḻittu
muṉ niṉṟu Irun=ta Oṭippokaiyil Ivar poli kaṭamai cilavu Āka kai Eṉakku va
yil yivar kāṇiyar Innāyaṉāṟkku tirunāmattukkāṇi Āka nāḷivaṟṟi vaṭavālaṅkuṭi muṭṭapāṭi Ellaikku kiḻakku kiḷi
yūr vārikku meṟku kiḷiyūr Ellai varavai nilattukku meṟkku viracoḻa teṟku tāṇpaṟṟu El
laikku vaṭakku naṭuvu Uḷpaṭṭa nilattukku ru ṭaiyāṉ naṉtiyarāyar kāṇiyāṉa nilamum marutūruṭaiyāṉ kaliṅkatarai
yar kāṇi Āṉa nilamum Uḷḷūr nāyaṉātevatānam nikki Ikkāṅkaiyar kāṇiyāṉa nilam 8 li Iṉnilam Eṇveliyum ku
ḷamum koṭṭakamum Ūrnatta viḻukkāṭum viṟṟuk kuṭutteṉ Uṭaiyār tiruneṭuṅkaḷa Uṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Ādicaṇḍeśvara
tevakaṉmikaḷukku tirukkāṭṭuppaḷḷi Uṭaiyarānāṉa ceḻiyakaṅkaneṉ yiṉ nilam Eṇ veliyum kuḷamum koṭṭakamum Ūrnatta
viḻukkāṭum viṟṟukkuṭuttu celvarāṉa Emmilicaiṉta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu nāṟkācu ṉāl Irācippaṇam 4 100 5 10 I
p paṇam nāṉūṟṟu Aimpatum koṇṭeṉ koṇṭa paricāvatu Ikkāṅkeyar perāl kāṟ kaṭamaikkum cikaikkum tuka
vākanvālattu tiruciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ tāḻaccu Āka Oṭukkiṉa kācu 4 100 5 10 Ippaṇam nāṉūṟṟu Aimpatum
viṟṟu vilaipramāṇa Icaivu tiṭṭukku kuṭutteṉ Iṉnilattu menokkiṉa maram kiṇokkiṉ kiṇaṟum kuḷamum koṭṭakamum natta
pātāciriyamum maṟṟu Eṟ(ṟa)perppaṭṭa putumaikaḷum Akappaṭa viṟṟuk kuṭut teṉ Iṉnilattukku Ivarkaḷ veṇum Eṉṟapote pra
māṇam paṇṇi kuṭukka kaṭaveṉākavum kuṭuttileṉākil Iṉnila pramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭe pramāṇamāvutākavum Itu Iv ṇ
ṟu poruḷccil volai Ārvatākavum Ituvaletu veṟu poruḷaccil Olai kāṭṭa kaṭavatallavākavum Ippaṭi cammatitu
vilaikkaṟa viṟṟu poruḷaṟa kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaipramāṇa Icaivu tiṭ(ṭ)ṭu kuṭutteṉ Uṭaiyar tiruneṭuṅkaḷa Uṭaiya nāyanār koyil Ā
dicaṇḍeśvara tevakanmikaḷukku kiḷiyūruṭaiyāṉāṉa Araiyaṉ tirukkāṭṭupaḷḷi Uṭaiyanāṉa ceḻiyakaṅkaneṉ Ippaṭi A
colla Ipramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭu Eḻutineṉ nāṭṭukkaṇakku ṭaiyāṉ
Digital edition of SII 26.718 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
